name: mintlify-agent-skills
description: Single-plugin marketplace shipping the TumbleweedLabs mintlify-agent-skills suite (router + design + write + create + maintain + patterns).

plugins.name: mintlify-agent-skills
plugins.description: Portable, MIT-licensed agent-skill suite for designing, creating, writing for, and maintaining Mintlify documentation sites. Site-type-agnostic; ships a router, four lifecycle skills, and six opt-in site-type templates.
